goal: Remove the opaque white outer background from the four main-menu button images so the initial menu buttons render cleanly against the hall background.
constraints: Only touch the four main-menu button raster assets unless a minimal audit note is needed.
Preserve the button frame artwork, text, and interior glow details.
Prefer non-destructive background transparency cleanup over redesigning the buttons.
Do not modify unrelated gameplay, menu logic, or card assets.
deliverables: Identify the button assets used by the four initial main-menu buttons.
Remove the connected white outer background from each button image.
Document the cleanup approach in a short audit note.
